title: IMMZD18SHib3Doses ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SHib3Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: First Hib dose from the primary series was administered-279
First Hib dose from the primary series was administered to the client within 1 year of age. Client's age is less than 5 years-302
Second Hib dose from the primary series was administered-122
Second Hib dose from the primary series was administered. Client's age is less than 5 years-167
Third Hib dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed-100

narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD18SHib3Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD18SHib3DosesVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
